importConfig.overwriteAllTooltip: Replace all existing values with new ones
importConfig.skipAllTooltip: Keep all existing values, skip new ones

strategies.keepIfEmptyDesc: Only fill if current is empty
strategies.orDesc: True if old OR new is true
strategies.andDesc: True only if both are true
strategies.newValuesAdded: New values will be added to dropdown options

importGuide.title: Import Strategy Guide
importGuide.subtitle: Common scenarios and how to configure them
importGuide.scenario1Title: Scenario 1: Add New Tags/Categories to Existing Contacts
importGuide.scenario2Title: Scenario 2: Update Contact Information (Replace Old Values)
importGuide.scenario3Title: Scenario 3: Fill Missing Data Only (Don't Overwrite)
importGuide.scenario4Title: Scenario 4: Update Numeric Values (Score, Points, etc.)
importGuide.scenario5Title: Scenario 5: Update Multi-Select Fields (Items, Services, etc.)
importGuide.scenario7Title: Scenario 7: Update Dates (Keep Most Recent or Oldest)
importGuide.scenario8Title: Scenario 8: Set a Fixed Value for All Contacts (No Column Needed)
importGuide.scenario8Description: Instead of mapping a field to a column in the file, you can set a fixed value that will apply to all imported contacts.
importGuide.scenario8Explanation: For example: if you're importing a list of customers and want all of them to have a policy end date of end of month - no need to add a column in the file. Just check 'Fixed Value' and enter the date.
importGuide.scenario8Step1: In the import settings, find the desired field (base or dynamic)
importGuide.scenario8Step3: Enter the value - it will apply to every imported contact
importGuide.scenario8TextResult: All contacts will get this text
importGuide.scenario8SelectResult: All contacts will get the selected value
importGuide.scenario8BoolResult: All contacts will be marked as True
importGuide.scenario8NumberResult: All contacts will get the value 100
importGuide.scenario8TagsResult: All contacts will get tags VIP and Premium
importGuide.scenario8MultiResult: All contacts will get the selected options
importGuide.scenario8Note: Fixed value always applies with 'Overwrite' strategy - even if an existing value exists, it will be replaced with the fixed value.
importGuide.fixedValueTipDesc: Check 📌 'Fixed Value' on any field to set a uniform value for all imported contacts. Perfect for cases like policy end date, status, category, etc. - no column in the file needed!
importGuide.testBeforeLive: Test Before Using Your Real Data!
importGuide.testWarning: IMPORTANT: Never test with your actual customer data! Follow these steps first.

tags.merge: Combine, remove duplicates ✅ Best for tags

dates.overwrite: Replace database value with import value

boolean.or: True if either is true (once true, stays true)
boolean.and: True only if both are true

validation.phoneNormalized: All phone number formats are automatically normalized to
validation.phoneCharsRemoved: All non-digit characters (spaces, dashes, +) are automatically removed ✅
validation.namesSmartFallbacks: Names are automatically handled with smart fallbacks
validation.namesUseFallback: Empty or null names automatically use phone number as fallback ✅
validation.emailsValidated: Email addresses are validated and normalized:
validation.emailsLowercase: ✅ Auto-lowercased and trimmed. Invalid emails are logged and set to empty.
validation.booleanMultiFormat: Boolean fields accept multiple formats - all auto-converted:
validation.booleanFlexible: ✅ Flexible formats: TRUE/FALSE, true/false, 1/0, Yes/No all work. Empty cells stay empty (not forced to false).
validation.tagsHashPrefix: ✅ Tags MUST have # prefix. Space-separated. # is stripped on import, added on export.
validation.datesMultiFormat: Date fields accept multiple formats - all auto-converted to YYYY-MM-DD:
validation.datesBestFormat: ✅ Best format: YYYY-MM-DD. Excel dates auto-convert. Invalid dates → empty field.
validation.namesDescription: Names are automatically handled with smart fallbacks:
validation.phoneDescription: All phone number formats are automatically normalized to 972XXXXXXXXX:
validation.ownerDescription: The "Owner" field identifies the user responsible for the contact.
validation.ownerNote: 💡 The "Owner" field is free text - you can enter any user name.

invoices.title: Invoices & Documents
invoices.subtitle: Manage all your financial documents
invoices.settingsDesc: Branding, numbering and defaults for all document types
invoices.numberingDesc: Each document type is numbered independently. Numbers cannot go backwards after issuance.
invoices.issueConfirm: Issue this document? It cannot be edited after issuance.
invoices.lockedMessage: This document has been issued and is locked
invoices.allocationWarning: Document amount exceeds threshold. An allocation number from the Tax Authority is required.
invoices.allocationBlocked:
Cannot issue this document.

The document amount (excl. VAT) exceeds ₪10,000, so an allocation number from the Tax Authority is required.

Allocation number integration will be available soon – until then, documents up to ₪10,000 only.
invoices.allocationWarningShort: Allocation number required from Tax Authority
invoices.autoInvoiceOnPaymentDesc: When a quote is marked as paid, automatically generate a tax invoice + receipt
invoices.orgContact: Org Contact – Always receives a copy
invoices.orgContactDesc: Every issued document will automatically be sent to this address. This ensures all invoices are backed up by email even if system data is lost.
invoices.orgContactNote: This address will always receive a copy of every document – cannot be removed when sending
invoices.autoSendOnIssue: Send to accountant on every document issuance
invoices.accountantBatchTip: From the invoices list you can also select documents and send a batch report to your accountant at end of month
invoices.monthlyReportDesc: Automatically send a monthly document summary to configured recipients (org contact + accountant). The report is sent on the 26th and covers the previous month.
invoices.monthlyReportEnabledDesc: Sent on the 26th of every month at 16:00 to configured recipients
invoices.monthlyReportDocTypes: Document types to include in report
invoices.monthlyReportNoRecipientsWarning: No recipients configured. Set an organizational contact or accountant above.
